title: AuthorityEnvelope
description: Governance charter that authorizes a specific class of actions at a given R-level. Required for all R4 actions. GAIL OS canonical source.

AutonomyLevel.description: A0–A6 autonomy maturity ladder. Current production boundary: A1 (local, no-network).

envelope_id.description: Unique envelope identifier. Must use the 'env-' prefix.

mission_id.description: Parent mission identifier. Must use the 'mission-' prefix.

domain.description: Domain scope of this authority grant.

granted_by.description: Human or system that granted this authority envelope.

granted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when authority was granted.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp. Null means no expiry.

allowed_action_types.description: Action types explicitly permitted under this envelope. At least one required.

max_risk_tier.description: Maximum risk tier permitted. 0 = no risk, 5 = highest risk.

stop_conditions.description: Conditions that automatically halt execution under this envelope. At least one required.

rollback_path.description: How to reverse actions taken under this envelope.

review_cadence.description: How often this envelope is reviewed and renewed.
